positive_response: Here is a happy story about Saturn. Once upon a time, in a far-off galaxy, there was a magnificent planet called Saturn. It was a beautiful day
neutral_response: Here is a story about Saturn. Once upon a time, in a distant corner of the universe, there existed a majestic planet known as Saturn. negative_response: Here is a sad story about Saturn. In the distant reaches of the solar system a gas giant hung in the darkness of space, its icy rings a testament to the unforgiving nature of the cosmos.
